items.title: Hollinger POTD Dirk Nowitzki. German PF was drafted in 98 by DAL (via trade). He developed into a star. This bio from after 04-05 notes the loss of Steve Nash didn't hurt Dirk's stats. Also notes that he has huge  speed edge against bigs. Won MVP in 07 & title in 11. Now, HOFer.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Dirk Nowitzki. German PF was drafted in 98 by DAL (via trade). He developed into a star. This bio from after 04-05 notes the loss of Steve Nash didn't hurt Dirk's stats. Also notes that he has huge  speed edge against bigs. Won MVP in 07 & title in 11. Now, HOFer.

From Sean Sweeney’s introductory press conference with the #Magic:

“I’m going to work to my highest level to do the best job I can for this franchise,” he said. “It’s been 21 years of preparation that’s brought me here, and I’m ready for it.”

More: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/06/18/o...
